- Why is this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `cargo check` if backend changed
- [ ] `cargo test` if backend changed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or architecture changed
